headline: Avery Dennison shares are trading lower after the company reported a Q1 adjusted EPS miss and issued Q2 EPS guidance below estimates.

headline: The Quiet Repricing Of ROAD Stock
summary: A road-paving company delivered explosive growth, yet its stock price has been stuck in neutral. The evidence suggests a quiet standoff between performance and perception.
